'''Daino Hyx''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] chief medical officer who was attached to [[Red Hand Squadron]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. He was stationed aboard the ship [[Retribution (Marauder-class)|''Retribution'']]. He was a short, bearded man who had studied medicine and psychology at one of [[Alderaan/Legends|Alderaan's]] top universities before joining the [[Corellia/Legends|Corellian]] resistance.

==Biography==
His primary assignment had been to find a way for [[Ylesia/Legends|Ylesian]] slaves to overcome the addictive qualities associated with the [[Exultation]]. To do this, he traveled to [[Nal Hutta/Legends|Nal Hutta]] to study how the [[t'landa Til]] produced the effect in their mating rituals. His solution had been a combination of therapies, mostly drugs and group sessions that would lessen the addictive qualities of the [[Exultation]].

When Red Hand Squadron had captured the slave-ship [[Emancipator (CR90 corvette)|''Helot's Shackle'']], Daino Hyx used his therapies on the captured slaves and was happy to produce great results in getting the pilgrims to overcome their addictions. This emboldened [[Bria Tharen]] to finally invade Ylesia and set all eight-thousand pilgrims free, hoping that a large majority of them would join the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] and boost their cause with strength and numbers.

==Appearances==
*''[[Rebel Dawn]]'' {{1st}}
